sections.title: Reproduction
sections.prompt: List the exact command or config used to reproduce the issue.

sections.title: Observed behavior
sections.prompt: Describe what happened and what was expected instead.

sections.title: Evidence
sections.prompt: Attach the most relevant plots, logs, or bundle files.

sections.title: Next action
sections.prompt: Start from the highest-signal repro case and attach a clear reproduction command.
